return(function(o,l,U,s,m,J,e,D,F,I,k,G,p,A,v,W,x,B,M,V,P,X,t,d)F,V,I,k,A,t,d,P,B,D,G,p,W,M,X,v,x={},function(o,z)local l=t(z)local U=function(U,s,m,J,e,x)return B(o,{U,s;m,J;e;x},z,l)end return U end,function(o)local z,B=-862716+862717,o[218711-218710]while B do F[B],z=F[B]-(367128-367127),(229337-229336)+z if 869535+-869535==F[B]then F[B],x[B]=nil,nil end B=o[z]end
